subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, that thou hast been illumined by the splendors of the Dawn of divine utterance and hast quaffed the choice wine of the love of the Lord of all existence. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بانوار فجر بیان فائز شدی و رحیق محبت مالک امکانرا نوشیدی طوبی لک و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
